name: Koninklijke Brill NV
summary: Koninklijke Brill NV operates as an academic publisher in Western Europe, North America, the Asia Pacific, and internationally. Its publications focus on the humanities and social sciences, international law, and selected areas in the sciences. The company offers books, journals, reference works, and primary sources materials in various areas, such as history, American studies, educational and Slavic studies, social sciences, biology, international law, human rights, humanitarian law, international relations, languages and linguistics, literature and culture studies, Asian studies, the Middle East and Islamic studies, African studies, philosophy, art, religion and Bible studies, theology, Jewish studies, Ancient Near East, Egyptology, classical antiquity, and Greek and Latin literature. It also distributes e-version of its products directly on brill.com, as well as through third party platforms and direct sales force. The company was founded in 1683 and is headquartered in Leiden, the Netherlands.
